description_long: This is an acoustic guitar housed in a hard-shell black case, which is partially open to reveal the instrument inside. The guitar features a natural wood finish with decorative floral engravings around the sound hole and body edge. The case exterior is adorned with colorful stickers, adding a personalized and urban touch. The guitar has a classic dreadnought body shape, a dark bridge, and a fretboard with visible frets and inlays. The interior of the case is lined with a soft, dark material to protect the guitar. The overall appearance suggests a well-cared-for instrument, likely used by a street musician or hobbyist.
description: A natural wood acoustic guitar with floral engravings, housed in a black hard-shell case decorated with colorful stickers.
description_view_0: The closed black guitar case is visible from above, decorated with several colorful stickers.
description_view_1: Side view showing the case partially open, revealing the guitar's neck and part of the body inside.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the open case, fully displaying the guitar's body, sound hole, and decorative engravings.
description_view_3: Frontal view into the open case, focusing on the guitar's fretboard, sound hole, and the interior lining of the case.
